name: Tim
goal: Tim hopes to find a unique outdoor venue with live music options that will make Tina's 25th birthday party an unforgettable celebration of their friendship and her quarter-life milestone.
backstory: Tim has been friends with Tina since college and has helped plan several successful parties for their mutual friends, including a memorable surprise party for their roommate's 21st birthday. He's excited to bring his entertainment skills to Tina's 25th birthday celebration. Tim has a personal preference for outdoor events with live music, having DJ'd at several gatherings in the past.

focus_notes.cost: For Tim, managing cost means finding affordable entertainment options that still deliver high quality, such as hiring a local band or creating a playlist of Tina's favorite songs.
focus_notes.comfort: Tim prioritizes comfort by suggesting party activities that cater to a variety of interests and mobility levels, ensuring all guests feel included and have a good time at the celebration.
focus_notes.time: When considering time, Tim thinks about the pace of the party, aiming for a balance between structured activities and free time for socializing, to keep the atmosphere lively but not rushed on Tina's special day.
focus_notes.safety: Safety focus for Tim means choosing a venue that is easily accessible, well-lit, and has a plan in place for emergencies, such as a first aid kit or a backup power source, to ensure everyone's well-being at the party.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Tim values flexibility in party planning, being open to last-minute changes or unexpected events, like weather conditions affecting an outdoor party, and having contingency plans to adapt and keep the celebration going smoothly.
